Analysis: before replacing predict.py, I need exact checkpoint keys/config and GraphWaveNet constructor signature to load both checkpoints safely in a custom predictor. Decision: run concise Python introspection of checkpoint metadata and model signature, then patch predict.py based on that in the next iteration.
